name: construction contractors processing 5–15 contracts/month tool
description: For construction contractors processing 5–15 contracts/month, inefficient bidding causes missed deadlines. We automate the bidding and contract process instead of manual tracking and email communication.
problem_solved: Inefficient bidding and contract management processes
